Spanish Finale: 100 Lessons Milestone

Congratulations! You've reached the end of the 100-lesson Spanish Grammar course.

What You've Accomplished

Over the last 10 units, we have covered:

  • Basics: Gender, Articles, and Regular Verbs.
  • Syntax: Pronoun placement and Sentence structure.
  • The Past: Preterite, Imperfect, and Perfect tenses.
  • The Future: Future and Conditional moods.
  • The Subjunctive: The most complex and beautiful part of Spanish grammar.

Keep Practicing!

Mastering a language is a lifelong journey. Use these lessons as a reference as you continue to speak, read, and listen to Spanish every day.

¡Buena suerte!
